flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Modesto Junior College rose 28% between 2007 and 2010 ($522 → $670).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Modesto Junior College rose 90% between 2007 and 2010 (8.8k → 16.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Modesto Junior College rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 (22.6% → 29.6%).
